workflows.name: Navy ATO Process — Moderate Impact
workflows.description: Standard Navy authorization workflow for Moderate impact systems following SECNAVINST 5239.3C and DoDI 8510.01.

steps.name: System Registration
steps.description: Register system in eMASS with Navy-specific metadata, assign ISSM/ISSO, and define authorization boundary.

steps.name: Categorization & Selection
steps.description: Complete FIPS 199 categorization, select NIST SP 800-53 Moderate baseline controls, apply Navy tailoring.

steps.name: STIG Implementation
steps.description: Implement applicable DISA STIGs for all system components. Run SCAP scans and remediate findings.

steps.name: SSP Development
steps.description: Document all control implementations in the System Security Plan. Include network diagrams and data flow.

steps.name: Security Assessment
steps.description: Conduct independent security assessment per NIST SP 800-53A. Document findings in SAR.

steps.name: POA&M Development
steps.description: Create Plan of Action & Milestones for all unmitigated findings. Prioritize by risk.

steps.name: Package Submission
steps.description: Submit authorization package (SSP, SAR, POA&M) to Navy AO via eMASS.

steps.name: AO Review & Decision
steps.description: Authorizing Official reviews package and makes authorization decision (ATO, DATO, IATO).

workflows.name: Navy ATO Process — High Impact
workflows.description: Navy authorization workflow for High impact systems requiring additional oversight and SAP/SCI considerations.

steps.name: System Registration & Classification
steps.description: Register system in eMASS with High impact classification. Identify SAP/SCI considerations.

steps.name: Enhanced Categorization
steps.description: Complete CNSSI 1253 categorization for NSS or FIPS 199 High categorization. Apply overlays.

steps.name: Control Selection & Augmentation
steps.description: Select High baseline controls with Navy-specific augmentations. Add privacy and CUI overlays.

steps.name: STIG & Hardening
steps.description: Implement all applicable STIGs at High level. Apply CIS benchmarks and DoD hardening guides.

steps.name: SSP & Documentation
steps.description: Develop comprehensive SSP with all High-level control implementations documented.

steps.name: Independent Assessment
steps.description: Independent SCA conducts thorough assessment including penetration testing.

steps.name: Risk Remediation
steps.description: Remediate critical and high findings. Develop POA&M with executive risk acceptance for remaining.

steps.name: Package & Submission
steps.description: Compile and submit full authorization package via eMASS.

steps.name: Senior AO Review
steps.description: Senior Authorizing Official reviews and makes authorization decision with terms.

workflows.name: Army ATO Process — Moderate Impact
workflows.description: Army authorization workflow for Moderate impact systems per AR 25-2 and DoDI 8510.01.

steps.name: System Registration
steps.description: Register system in eMASS with Army POC chain and authorization boundary.

steps.name: Categorization
steps.description: Complete FIPS 199 categorization and register with ARCYBER.

steps.name: Control Selection
steps.description: Select Moderate baseline and apply Army-specific tailoring per ARCYBER directives.

steps.name: Implementation & STIGs
steps.description: Implement controls and STIGs. Run ACAS and SCAP scans.

steps.name: Documentation
steps.description: Complete SSP and supporting documentation in eMASS.

steps.name: Assessment
steps.description: Independent SCA assessment per NIST SP 800-53A.

steps.name: Package Submission
steps.description: Submit authorization package to Army AO.

steps.name: AO Decision
steps.description: Army AO reviews and issues authorization decision.

workflows.name: Air Force ATO Process — Moderate Impact
workflows.description: Air Force authorization workflow for Moderate impact systems per AFI 17-130 and DoDI 8510.01.

steps.name: System Registration
steps.description: Register system in eMASS with AF-specific attributes and authorization boundary.

steps.name: Categorization & Selection
steps.description: Complete categorization and select Moderate baseline with AF tailoring.

steps.name: Implementation
steps.description: Implement controls, apply STIGs, run compliance scans.

steps.name: Documentation
steps.description: Complete SSP and all supporting documentation.

steps.name: Assessment
steps.description: SCA conducts independent security assessment.

steps.name: POA&M & Remediation
steps.description: Address findings and develop POA&M for residual risks.

steps.name: Submission & Decision
steps.description: Submit package and receive AO authorization decision.
